parsed.clarification_question: The delegation is ambiguous; please select the primary focus: 1. Writing polish (R1.6), 2. Logical consistency (R1.2), 3. Evidence-claim alignment (R1.3), or 4. Novelty assessment (R1.4).

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing in any research writing delegation to ensure limitations and tentative conclusions are transparently communicated.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration of results and maintain scientific integrity in the reported findings.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep the analysis and conclusions within the bounds of the described experiments and benchmark.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to identify and mitigate potential misuse or negative impacts of the proposed reranker model.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to ensure all claims and data references can be traced back to their origins for verifiability.
